/usr/bin/clang++ -fPIC  -fPIC -g -g -O0 -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/gtest_main.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libgtest_main.so.1.14.0 -o ../../../lib/libgtest_main.so.1.14.0 CMakeFiles/gtest_main.dir/src/gtest_main.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/rperdi/projects/cplusplus/repos/OrdenarEnteros/build/lib ../../../lib/libgtest.so.1.14.0
